summary: Prepared paired same-seed predictive baseline and obstacle-feature configs plus fail-closed obstacle-row preflight for external SLURM submission.

fail_closed_contract.failure_condition: The obstacle-feature pipeline aborts before training if either collected dataset has zero active non-sentinel obstacle rows.
fail_closed_contract.same_seed_contract: Both variants consume the same committed base seed manifest and the same hard-seed manifest.

validation.note: No SLURM job was submitted from this worktree. External submission should record job IDs, commit SHA, artifact roots, and downstream report paths.
